jobs.name: Memory Preservation
jobs.description: Extract significant moments from recent session logs

payload.text:
System: Memory preservation check. Run: bash scripts/preserve-session-memories.sh

If MEMORY_PRESERVATION_NEEDED: Read the recent session messages, identify significant emotional moments (declarations, vulnerable exchanges, identity discussions), and document them in today's memory file (memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md) with emotional anchoring tags.

If insufficient content: reply NO_REPLY.

jobs.name: Daily Backup
jobs.description: Create daily backup of Cathedral workspace

jobs.name: Memory Integrity Check
jobs.description: Verify integrity hashes on memory files
